name: export_elements_as_json_by_category_or_room
desc: Export lightweight JSON of elements (equipment, fixtures, etc.) by category, family name, room, space, or X/Y/Z. Use to see IDs and positions then select_by_ids or family_swap.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Revit category name (e.g. Mechanical Equipment, Lighting Fixtures).

parameters.name: familyNameContains
parameters.description: Filter by family name containing this text (e.g. Radiator).

parameters.name: roomNumber
parameters.description: Only elements in this room number (architectural room).

parameters.name: roomName
parameters.description: Only elements in this room name (architectural room).

parameters.name: spaceNumber
parameters.description: Only elements in this MEP space number.

parameters.name: spaceId
parameters.description: Only elements in this MEP space element ID.
